summary: Add loosefruit duplicate DocID deletion via Plantware UI browser automation. Loosefruit list page: frmPrTrxLooseFruitList.aspx. Pattern mirrors existing duplicate cleanup: dry-run scan shows table, then delete selected rows via UI.
approach: 1) Create loosefruit page-actions runner module mirroring duplicate-docids.ts. 2) Extend delete-duplicates-runner.ts to handle loosefruit category. 3) Add LoosefruitFetchWorker + UI section in MainWindow._build_duplicate_cleanup_tab(). 4) Wire up dry-run + execute slots.
